name: Steak & Kidney Pie with Guinness
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chuck Steak; trimmed, into 1.2 inch pieces
12 oz Ox Kidney; cored and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large skillet, brown the steak and kidney pieces over medium heat until well done.
3. Add Guinness, dripping or lard, onions, flour, mushrooms, stock or water, and bay leaf to the pan. Stir to combine.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove bay leaf before filling pie crusts.
6. Place pie crust in a baking dish and pour in the mixture from step 4.
7. Cover with second crust and trim edges.
8. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until golden brown.
